System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference HU5_ENTRY470_00.00.08_Series_E_40_0.ddt_20170421_20170425T171455.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 638
Receive ID 5B8
Functional Addr EB
Functional Name HU
